reasoning: This workout addresses poor lactate clearance, your primary limiter. The extended rest period means we will reduce intensity slightly today compared to previous sessions. Focusing on over-unders will closely simulate Alpine Loop's demands, building strong aerobic capacity.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3 sets of 12-min over-unders: 3 min at 201W, 3 min at 256W, 3 min at 209W, 3 min at 242W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
